---
name: Change request
about: Request a deployment, packaging, or infrastructure-governance change
title: '[Change] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested change.

## Why this is needed

Explain the problem, constraint, or opportunity.

## Scope

- [ ] Build or packaging logic
- [ ] Deployment workflow or environment policy
- [ ] Cluster configuration
- [ ] Documentation or governance

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Affected environments are identified
- [ ] Affected services are identified
- [ ] Rollout or rollback implications are explicit
- [ ] Documentation updates in English are identified

## Notes

Add environment, rollout, or follow-up details here.
